name: convenience
description: Consumer-convenience defaults: workspace copy-path hotkeys (Cmd+- / Cmd+=) + Cmd+T -> today's daily + Dataview JS enable + Tasks plugin taskFormat=dataview (suppresses emoji suggester) + sauce-tasks-icons CSS snippet (legacy-emoji-task render fallback). v0.2.1 PATCH (v0.41.2): community_plugin_settings[] +1 entry obsidian-tasks-plugin taskFormat=dataview — switches Tasks plugin from tasksPluginEmoji format to dataview inline-field format; suggester popup shows text labels ("due date" / "high priority") instead of emoji-prefixed labels; new tasks stored as `[due:: 2026-05-13]` syntax; existing emoji-tasks remain parseable (backwards-compatible). Per-entry plugin-dir-absent guard means workshop without tasks plugin gets graceful skip. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.41.0): hotkeys[] +1 entry binding Cmd+T to daily-notes:goto-today (inherits new-tab semantics from alwaysOpenInNewTab); NEW manifest field snippets[] + appearance.enabledCssSnippets[] piggybacks on existing applyAppearance helper to register sauce-tasks-icons; NEW installer helper applySnippets (helper count 13 -> 14) copies declared CSS assets to .obsidian/snippets/sauce-*.css mirroring applyVendoredThemes sha256-compare overwrite-with-backup posture; landmine #12 allowlist 17 -> 18 with carve-out narrowing user-owned snippets to anything NOT matching sauce-*.css. v0.21.1 origin (carried over): introduces hotkeys[] + community_plugin_settings[] manifest fields + applyHotkeys + applyCommunityPluginData installer helpers.
